name: Internet Stability Tracker
description: Monitor your internet speed, detect outages, and track network stability — auto tests, live badge, sparkline history. Works in Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Brave, and Opera.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src https://backend-cold-butterfly-9535.fly.dev https://internet-stability-tracker.vercel.app; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
